title: vitis vinifera var. rupestris
intro: Vitis vinifera var. rupestris, also known as the wild grapevine or Rupestris grapevine, is a variety of the common grapevine (Vitis vinifera) native to North America. The medicinal properties of Vitis vinifera var. rupestris include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Vitis vinifera var. rupestris include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and antioxidant defenses. Vitis vinifera var. rupestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
